title: GroupBox Properties
description:
GroupBox Properties

GroupBox Properties and Events

The following list is a summary of the GroupBox control properties with brief descriptions.  Click on the property names for more details.

Property	Description

BackColor	Selects the background color for the
		 object's label.

Default: Control

Enabled	Determines if the control is enabled
		 or not.

Default: 1 -
		 True

EventTaskType	The type of task used for events.

Default: 0 -
		 Normal

Font	Specifies the font for the control

Default: Microsoft
		 San Serif, 8.25 pt

FontBold	The bold attribute for the current font
		 (Only available from SPEL+ programs).

Default: 0 - False

FontItalic	The italic attribute for the current
		 font (Only available from SPEL+ programs).

Default: 0 - False

FontName	The name for the current font (Only
		 available from SPEL+ programs).

Default: Microsoft Sans Serif

FontSize	The size for the current font in points
		 (Only available from SPEL+ programs).

Default: 8.25

ForeColor	Specifies the fore colorfor the control

Default: ControlText

Height	Specifies the height of the control.

Default:

Left	Specifies
		 the left location of the control.

Default:

Name	Used to assign a unique name to the
		 GroupBox control.

Default: GroupBoxXX

TabIndex	Sets the tab index for the control

Default: 0

Text	Sets the text for the control

Default:

ToolTipText	Sets the text
		 for the tooltip.

Default:

Top	Sets the location of the top of the
		 GroupBox control.

Default:

Visible	Sets if the
		 control is Visible or not.

Default: 1 -
		 True

Width	Sets the width
		 of the GroupBox control.

Default:

Property	Description

Click	Executes when the user clicks the control
		 with the mouse.
